subject: real-world session date
fact: The session took place on December 14th, 2025.

subject: rest duration
fact: The party rested for eight uneventful hours.
source_quote: After eight uneventful hours of rest

subject: Barlgura count
fact: Two Barlgura demons burst from behind to attack the party.
source_quote: two ugly Barlgura demons burst from behind

subject: enslavement duration
fact: Teegan and Drystan had been enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years.
source_quote: enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years

subject: escape time
fact: Teegan and Drystan escaped only a day ago.

subject: travel duration to palace
fact: The party traveled for another day to reach the palace.

subject: Yugoloth height
fact: Maram il Vass is a seven-foot-tall Yugoloth.

subject: ransom amount
fact: Maram il Vass demanded ten thousand gold pieces for the prisoner.

subject: alternative ransom
fact: Maram il Vass demanded two rare magical items as an alternative to gold.

subject: back room demon count
fact: Two more demons emerged from the back room.
source_quote: two more demons emerged from the back room

subject: Felkur level
fact: The party reached 11th level.
source_quote: The party is informed they have reached 11th level

subject: Felkur AC
fact: Felkur infused his armor to achieve 17 AC.
source_quote: decides to infuse his own armor for 17 AC

subject: Bramgrim spell level
fact: True Seeing is Bramgrim's only 6th-level spell.

subject: fake item duration
fact: Felkur considers creating fake rare magical items that last eight hours.
source_quote: fake rare magical items that only last eight hours

subject: main palace height
fact: The main black and red marble building is 50 feet high.

subject: flanking building height
fact: Two smaller buildings flanking the main structure are 30 feet high.

subject: travel distance from escapees
fact: The palace is about a day's travel from where Teegan and Drystan were found.
source_quote: about a day's travel from Teegan and Drystan

subject: ransom gold value
fact: Maram il Vass demands 10,000 gold pieces for the release of the Drow.

subject: ransom item count
fact: Maram il Vass demands two rare magical items as an alternative ransom.

subject: fake item duration
fact: Felkur considers creating fake rare magical items that last for eight hours.

subject: Barlgura demon count
fact: Two Barlgura demons ambushed the party.

subject: Teegan enslavement duration
fact: Teegan was enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years.
source_quote: enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years

subject: True Seeing duration
fact: The True Seeing spell lasts for one hour.

subject: Volley range
fact: The Volley ability allows ranged attacks against creatures within 10 feet of a point.

subject: Cure Wounds uses
fact: The Cure Wounds spell provides 10 uses of healing when stored.

subject: palace central building height
fact: The central building of Maram il Vass's palace stands 50 feet high.

subject: flanking buildings height
fact: Two smaller buildings flank the central palace structure and are 30 feet high.

subject: level up target
fact: The Owlbear and the party level up to 11th level.
source_quote: levels up with the party to 11th level

subject: Akritas level up target
fact: Akritas levels up to 11th level.

subject: demon count in back room
fact: Two more demons are revealed to be in the back room.

subject: tapestry count
fact: There are two large tapestries in the entrance foyer.

subject: Spirit Guardians level
fact: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians at fourth level.

subject: Silence spell level
fact: Silence is a third-level spell.

subject: True Seeing spell level
fact: True Seeing is a 6th-level spell.

subject: Cure Wounds spell level
fact: Cure Wounds is a first-level spell.

subject: Enlarge/Reduce spell level
fact: Enlarge/Reduce is a second-level spell.

subject: Levitate spell level
fact: Levitate is a second-level spell.
